summary: Source the workspace slug in the novel commands from PLANE_SLUG / Config.TemplateVars["slug"] instead of the pre-reprint PLANE_WORKSPACE_SLUG / Config.WorkspaceSlug.
reason: The reprinted client resolves the {slug} endpoint template var from PLANE_SLUG (internal/client/url.go) into Config.TemplateVars; aligning the hand-written commands to the same env var means one PLANE_SLUG drives both generated sync and the novel relations/module commands, so the auto-enrichment hook finds a slug during a wrapped sync.
validated_outcome: With PLANE_SLUG exported, the wrapped sync's module enrichment resolves the slug and fires; without the alignment it would silently no-op (the generated client uses PLANE_SLUG, not PLANE_WORKSPACE_SLUG).
